## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user or project problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- Operations
- Analytics
- MongoDB
- Streamlit dashboard
- Docker/local setup
- Documentation

## Additional Context

Add examples, sketches or references if useful.
